summary: Iteration 10 - All 8 new features VERIFIED WORKING. Calendar page with widget/events/filters/time range, MindMap improvements (node click focus mode + split MultiSelect filters), Collections table view toggle, Custom content type fix (key prop re-render). All previous features still work (delete via three dots, links dialog stays open).
passed_tests: CALENDAR PAGE - Navigate to /calendar loads correctly with calendar widget, events list, Sections MultiSelect filter, Tags MultiSelect filter, time range selector
CALENDAR EVENTS - 4 events displayed (2 Inventaire, 1 Souhaits, 1 Contenu) all dated 2026-02-28
CALENDAR SECTIONS FILTER - MultiSelect with checkboxes for Inventaire, Souhaits, Contenu, Projets, Taches. Selecting Inventaire filters correctly
CALENDAR TIME RANGE - Select dropdown with Semaine/Mois/Annee options, changes work correctly
MINDMAP PAGE - 6 nodes displayed with split MultiSelect filters: Sections and Tags
MINDMAP NODE CLICK FOCUS - Clicking Collection A shows 'Focus: Collection A' badge, dims 4 unconnected nodes (opacity 0.25), keeps 2 normal (Collection A + B connected)
MINDMAP FOCUS TOGGLE - Second click on same node removes focus mode
COLLECTIONS VIEWTOGGLE - Card/table view toggle buttons present and functional
COLLECTIONS TABLE VIEW - Table shows columns: Nom, Items, Catégorie with 2 rows
COLLECTIONS TABLE THREE DOTS - Menu shows Modifier/Supprimer options
CUSTOM CONTENT TYPE FIX - Adding custom type 'newstype123' immediately shows in Select dropdown (key prop fix working)
DELETE STILL WORKS - Created TEST_DeleteMe999, deleted via three dots, toast confirms, stayed on /content page
LINKS STILL WORK - Dialog stays open during link operations

success_rate.backend: 100% - Calendar events API returns correct data

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_DeleteMe999 content for delete testing. Created custom type 'newstype123' in content dialog.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features verified working. Key implementations: 1) CalendarPage.js - new page with rdp calendar widget, calendarApi.getEvents(), MultiSelect filters for Sections/Tags, Select for time range (Semaine/Mois/Annee). 2) MindmapPage.js - onNodeClick sets focusedNodeId state, connectedNodeIds computed from edges, dimmed nodes have opacity 0.25 via data.dimmed prop, split MultiSelect filters. 3) CollectionsPage.js - ViewToggle component (view-card-btn/view-table-btn), table view with Nom/Items/Catégorie columns, three dots in each row. 4) ContentPage.js - key={formData.content_type} on Select forces re-render when custom type added.

calendar_page.events_list: 4 events displayed with type icons and badges
calendar_page.sections_filter: MultiSelect with 5 checkboxes (Inventaire, Souhaits, Contenu, Projets, Taches)

mindmap_improvements.split_filters: Sections MultiSelect + Tags MultiSelect (two separate filters)
mindmap_improvements.node_click_focus: Clicking node shows Focus badge, dims unconnected nodes
mindmap_improvements.focus_dimming: 4 dimmed nodes, 2 normal nodes when Collection A focused

custom_content_type_fix.select_updates: FIXED - Select immediately shows new type 'newstype123'

links_still_work.dialog_stays_open: Yes - dialog remains open during link operations
links_still_work.search_works: Can search for items to link

mindmap_page.png - 6 nodes, Sections and Tags filters
